# Data Source: okta_network_zones

Get a list of network zones from Okta.

## Example Usage

{{tffile "/Users/rmcgregor/Development/terraform-provider-okta/examples/data-sources/okta_network_zones/data-source.tf"}}

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (String) Filter criteria. Filter value will be URL-encoded by the provider.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `network_zones` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--network_zones))

<a id="nestedatt--network_zones"></a>
### Nested Schema for `network_zones`

Read-Only:

- `asns` (List of String)
- `dynamic_locations` (List of String)
- `dynamic_locations_exclude` (List of String)
- `dynamic_proxy_type` (String)
- `gateways` (List of String)
- `id` (String)
- `ip_service_categories_exclude` (List of String)
- `ip_service_categories_include` (List of String)
- `name` (String)
- `proxies` (List of String)
- `status` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `usage` (String)
